prompt: An East Asian woman stands under a weeping willow in a sunlit courtyard. Low-angle shot from the top of the head to the calves, centered, with her body slightly turned to the left, a calm expression, lips slightly parted, and chin slightly raised. Slender figure, warm fair skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, a straight nose, and coral-rose lips. Editorial makeup with translucent skin, peach-pink blush, brown eyeliner, and warm-toned eyeshadow. Real pore texture, with fine highlights on the face, neck, shoulders, and arms. Deep brownish-black hair in a loose low bun, with wisps falling over the cheeks, neck, and shoulders; a single damp strand clings to the left shoulder and chest. The stray hairs on the crown are illuminated by sunlight, looking rustic and slightly messy. A cream-beige off-the-shoulder crop top in an asymmetrical draping raw silk linen texture, with narrow ties knotted at the back of the neck and a bow at the side of the waist; a high slanted collar with the hem reaching above the navel. Featuring dark brown, olive, and pale gold floral embroidery, with handcrafted stitching texture, opaque and well-fitting. A dark olive charcoal long skirt with vertical pleats in matte fabric, with a rust-brown terracotta cloth strip wrapped around the waist, loosely knotted at the front left with the tail hanging to the skirt; a coarse linen scarf with frayed edges and tassels at the left hip, giving the waist ornament a handmade feel. Left arm hanging at the side, right arm extended diagonally to hold the handle of a large willow basket. Hands show accurate knuckles and natural, clean, short nails. A large dark-brown willow-weaved basket sits in the lower-right foreground, with a wide round body, a thick arched handle, and dense hand-worn strips; the sunlit edges contrast with the dark interior of the basket mouth, occupying the lower-right quadrant as a secondary focal point. The setting is an ancient East Asian wooden house courtyard: weathered wooden walls, lattice windows, carved door frames, wooden pillars, and a tiled roof. The wood grain is coarse, beams are irregular, and the interior is dimly lit. A light-colored hanging cloth hangs over a dark doorway behind the left shoulder. Weeping willow branches and leaves traverse the top, with green leaves of varying density crossing over the eaves and surrounding the head and shoulders without obscuring the eyes, creating scattered dappled light and shadow. Below are coarse stone bases, stone steps, slabs, and grass; the distant view is softened to highlight the figure, clothing, and basket. Warm sunlight filters from the upper right front like early summer midday shade; highlights are bright on the shoulders, arms, cheeks, neck, waist, and basket handle. The face and body have soft reflected light, while cool-toned shadows fall under the hair, chin, arms, clothing folds, and eaves. Dappled willow shadows fall across the skin, clothing, wooden walls, and basket; highlights are warm, and shadows are cold olive-brown. Earthy color palette: cream parchment beige, dark olive, weathered brown, charcoal gray, rust-colored terracotta, willow green, and warm skin tones, with restrained saturation. Soft film grain, highlight halation, transparent shadows, and atmospheric perspective. Full-frame 50–65mm, f/2.8–f/4, focus on eyes, face, embroidery, knots, and the right hand on the basket handle; distant view blurred but retaining texture, with a slightly low-angle statuesque feel. High-end rural fashion editorial: natural beauty, handmade clothing, traditional architecture, pastoral elegance, realistic skin texture, distinct hair strands, precise embroidery, basket texture, aged wood, natural hands, and cinematic realism. No text, logos, watermarks, extra people, modern objects, plastic skin, deformed fingers, duplicate limbs, deformed basket, oversaturated colors, artificial HDR, or harsh studio lighting.

promptZh: 一位 东亚女性 站在阳光明媚的庭院中，身旁是一棵垂柳。低角度拍摄，从头顶到小腿，居中构图，身体微向左转，表情平静，双唇微启，下巴微抬。身材修长，肤色白皙温暖，杏仁状深棕色眼睛，鼻梁挺直，珊瑚玫瑰色嘴唇。编辑级妆容，皮肤通透，桃粉色腮红，棕色眼线，暖色调眼影。真实的毛孔质感，面部、颈部、肩部和手臂上有细腻的高光。深棕黑色头发梳成松散的低发髻，发丝垂落在脸颊、颈部和肩部；一缕湿润的发丝贴在左肩和胸前。头顶的碎发被阳光照亮，显得质朴而略显凌乱。身穿一件 奶油米色露肩短款上衣，采用不对称垂坠感的生丝亚麻材质，颈后系有窄带，腰侧系有蝴蝶结；高斜领设计，下摆位于肚脐上方。饰有深棕色、橄榄色和浅金色的花卉刺绣，带有手工缝制的质感，不透明且合身。搭配一条深橄榄炭色长裙，哑光面料带有垂直褶皱，腰间缠绕着锈棕色陶土布条，在左前方松散地打结，尾部垂至裙摆；左臀处系有一条边缘磨损并带有流苏的粗亚麻围巾，赋予腰部装饰手工感。左臂自然下垂，右臂斜向伸出，手持一个大柳篮的提手。手部指关节准确，指甲自然、干净且修剪整齐。右下角前景处有一个巨大的深棕色柳编篮，篮身圆润宽大，提手粗壮，带有手工编织的致密条纹；阳光照亮的边缘与篮口深邃的内部形成对比，占据右下象限作为次要焦点。场景为 古老的东亚木屋庭院：风化的木墙、格栅窗、雕花门框、木柱和瓦顶。木纹粗糙，梁柱不规则，室内光线昏暗。左肩后方的深色门洞上挂着一块浅色垂布。垂柳枝叶横跨顶部，疏密有致的绿叶穿过屋檐，环绕在头部和肩部周围，且不遮挡眼睛，营造出斑驳的光影。下方是粗糙的石基、石阶、石板和草地；远景经过柔化处理，以突出人物、服装和篮子。温暖的阳光从右前方斜射而来，如同初夏午后的阴影；肩部、手臂、脸颊、颈部、腰部和篮柄上有明亮的高光。面部和身体有柔和的反射光，而头发、下巴、手臂、衣褶和屋檐下则有冷色调的阴影。斑驳的柳影投射在皮肤、服装、木墙和篮子上；高光温暖，阴影呈冷橄榄棕色。大地色调：奶油羊皮纸米色、深橄榄色、风化棕色、炭灰色、锈陶土色、柳绿色和温暖的肤色，饱和度克制。柔和的胶片颗粒感、高光晕影、通透的阴影和大气透视。全画幅 50–65mm，f/2.8–f/4，焦点集中在眼睛、面部、刺绣、结扣以及握住篮柄的右手上；远景模糊但保留质感，具有轻微低角度的雕塑感。高端乡村时尚大片：自然美、手工服装、传统建筑、田园优雅、写实皮肤质感、清晰的发丝、精准的刺绣、篮子质感、陈旧木材、自然的手部细节和电影级真实感。无文字、无标志、无水印、无额外人物、无现代物品、无塑料感皮肤、无畸形手指、无重复肢体、无畸形篮子、无过度饱和色彩、无人工 HDR、无生硬的摄影棚灯光。
